title: Customer Segmentation Dashboard
text:
ImportantExecutive Overview



This project analyzes customer segmentation patterns to identify revenue concentration, customer value tiers, and strategic growth opportunities.
Key finding: Revenue is highly concentrated in a small number of high-value customers (Pareto structure).

title: Customer Segmentation Dashboard
text:
📊 What’s inside

Executive summary of segmentation results

Cluster-level revenue breakdown

Customer value stratification

Revenue concentration (risk analysis)

Strategic business implications

title: Customer Segmentation Dashboard
text:
🧭 Navigation
Use the top menu to explore the full analysis.

title: Executive Summary
text:
Customer revenue follows a strong Pareto distribution, where:

A small number of clusters dominate total revenue
High-value customers are extremely scarce but disproportionately important
Mid-tier customers form the operational backbone

title: Executive Summary
text:
Customer revenue follows a strong Pareto distribution, where:

A small number of clusters dominate total revenue
High-value customers are extremely scarce but disproportionately important
Mid-tier customers form the operational backbone

title: Executive Summary
text:
Business Interpretation

Cluster 2 = primary revenue engine

Clusters 3–4 = high-value enterprise + whale accounts

Clusters 0–1 = low ARPU mass market

title: Executive Summary
text:
Strategic Implications






Warning



Revenue concentration introduces dependency risk, but also highlights clear upsell opportunities in mid-tier segments.

title: Business Insights
text:
Revenue is not evenly distributed
Cluster 2 dominates total revenue
Clusters 3–4 create extreme skew

title: Business Insights
text:
Revenue is not evenly distributed
Cluster 2 dominates total revenue
Clusters 3–4 create extreme skew

title: Business Insights
text:
⚠️ Risk Profile






Important



A small number of customers contribute a large share of revenue → high concentration risk

title: Business Insights
text:
🚀 Growth Opportunities

Upsell Clusters 0–2 into higher tiers

Expand ARPU in Cluster 2 (core leverage point)

Protect Cluster 3–4 accounts (critical revenue stability)

title: Business Insights
text:
🧠 Key Takeaway
This is a power-law customer system, not a uniform segmentation.
